inputs.label: Gender (0: Female, 1: Male)
inputs.businessContext: Biological gender as numeric code: 0 for female, 1 for male.

businessContext_i18n.en: Biological gender as numeric code: 0 for female, 1 for male.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Biyolojik cinsiyet sayısal kod: 0 kadın, 1 erkek.
businessContext_i18n.de: Biologisches Geschlecht als numerischer Code: 0 für weiblich, 1 für männlich.

inputs.label: Age (years)
inputs.businessContext: Age of the individual in years.

businessContext_i18n.en: Age of the individual in years.

inputs.label: Activity Level
inputs.businessContext: Physical activity multiplier: 1.2 sedentary, 1.375 light, 1.55 moderate, 1.725 active, 1.9 very active.

businessContext_i18n.en: Physical activity multiplier: 1.2 sedentary, 1.375 light, 1.55 moderate, 1.725 active, 1.9 very active.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Fiziksel aktivite çarpanı: 1.2 hareketsiz, 1.375 hafif, 1.55 orta, 1.725 aktif, 1.9 çok aktif.
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikator für körperliche Aktivität: 1,2 sitzend, 1,375 leicht, 1,55 moderat, 1,725 aktiv, 1,9 sehr aktiv.

formulas.bmr: (gender * (10 * weight_kg + 6.25 * height_cm - 5 * age + 5)) + ((1 - gender) * (10 * weight_kg + 6.25 * height_cm - 5 * age - 161))

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
